displayTitle: Let the Type of Test Pick the Frequency

beats.narration: In the depth formula, conductivity and permeability belong to the part. Frequency is the one term still yours at setup.

payload.title: FREQUENCY IS YOURS
payload.sub: The part fixes the rest. You set the frequency.

beats.narration: Watch one part at three frequencies. The current must reach the feature you are hired to find — drop the frequency and it dives deeper.

payload.heading: One part, three frequencies, one rule
payload.note: δ ≈ 660/√(f·µr·σ)   ·   CURRENT MUST REACH THE FLAW

beats.narration: So stop asking what frequency is best. Ask what type of test this is — surface, subsurface, or property — and physics names the band.

payload.heading: Type of test names the band

beats.narration: Surface cracks pile current into a paint-thin skin. Subsurface, place the flaw near one depth, never past three. Tubing spreads the walls.

chips.s: Skin under a millimeter; cracks rotate off lift-off
60 kHz at the knee, enough metal under the probe

beats.narration: Run far off optimum and the test goes blind. The formula plans it — always prove the setup on your reference standard first.

payload.sub: The formula plans; the standard demonstrates.
